transcript: Speaker A: इंटरव्यू में 'MySelf Karthik' बोलके इंट्रो दे सकता हूँ क्या? [Can I introduce myself as 'MySelf Karthik' in an interview?] Speaker B: नहीं कार्तिक, 'MySelf' से शुरू करना गलत है। 'I am Karthik' या 'My name is Karthik' बोलो, वही सही लगेगा। [No Karthik, starting with 'MySelf' is wrong. Say 'I am Karthik' or 'My name is Karthik', that will sound correct.] Speaker A: ओके ओके, मुझे इंग्लिश अच्छे से बोलना नहीं आता। [Okay okay, I don't know how to speak English well.] Speaker B: डरो मत, मेरे साथ रोज़ 15 मिनट बात करो, फिर देखना तुम अच्छी इंग्लिश में कैसे बोलते हो। [Don't be afraid, talk to me for 15 minutes daily, then see how well you speak English.] Speaker A: फीस ज़्यादा तो नहीं होगा? [The fees won't be too high, right?] Speaker B: सिर्फ ₹1 में MySivi ऐप ट्राई कर सकते हो। 1 करोड़ से ज़्यादा लोग मेरे साथ सीख रहे हैं। [You can try MySivi app for just ₹1. More than 1 crore people are learning with me.] Speaker C: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: MySelf Karthik, MySelf, I AM KARTHIK, MY NAME IS KARTHIK, AACHE SE BOLNA, DARO, FEES, MySivi Premium, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access, Start English Learning -MySivi, 10M+ Downloads, MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: A man on a beach asks an AI robot for interview advice, and the robot corrects his English introduction. The robot then introduces the MySivi app, highlighting a 3-day premium trial for just ₹1. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app.
